response.justification: Bogdan has extensive backend engineering experience, distributed systems knowledge, and some involvement in agentic AI tooling (MCP, AI-agent infrastructure). However, his resume lacks direct experience with multi-agent production systems, fintech infrastructure (credit risk, real-time trade decisioning, regulatory compliance), or scaling engineering teams to 30+ engineers. His leadership roles are not clearly executive-level, and fintech-specific experience is limited.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise with event-driven architectures and microservices
Experience with AI-agent tooling and developer infrastructure (MCP, code generators)
Proven track record of scaling engineering practices (CI/CD, TDD, dev-ops) and building high-performance teams
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech or high-stakes commercial environments
Limited evidence of executive-level leadership (e.g., no CTO/CTO-like roles, no fintech-scale team growth)
Lack of direct experience with fintech-specific systems (credit risk, trade decisioning, regulatory compliance)
